description: MCP server exposing an Outflow workspace's live architecture graph as context for AI coding agents
name: io.github.laurells/outflow-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your running Outflow instance. Defaults to http://localhost:3000 if omitted.
environmentVariables.name: OUTFLOW_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: API key for the workspace to expose. Create one from workspace settings in Outflow (Settings → API Keys) — the raw key (ofk_...) is shown once.
environmentVariables.name: OUTFLOW_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: ID of the workspace to expose. Found in the workspace URL (.../workspace/<id>/...) or workspace settings.
environmentVariables.name: OUTFLOW_WORKSPACE_ID
